message:
refactor(tests): migrate quantile E2E tests to direct dispatch_host_call_shared API and apply formatting fixes

runtime_risk_quantile_evidence.rs:
- Replace dispatch_host_call_shared_compat() shim calls with direct
  dispatch_host_call_shared() calls, removing the compatibility wrapper
  indirection
- Add missing import for dispatch_host_call_shared
- Fix unsafe error field access: wrap result.error.as_ref().unwrap()
  in if-let for safer Option handling
- Apply rustfmt: break long assert messages across lines
- Replace Unicode arrow (→) with ASCII (->) in comments for consistency

runtime_risk_quantile_validation.rs:
- Reorder imports alphabetically (RUNTIME_RISK_LEDGER_SCHEMA_VERSION
  moved before RuntimeRiskActionValue)
- Change default_risk_config() from fn to const fn for compile-time
  evaluation
- Expand setup_test_context() return type tuple across multiple lines
  for readability
- Remove unnecessary line breaks in single-line assert messages
- Refactor structured JSONL log emission formatting

Both files: no behavioral changes, only API migration and formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
